# Codemap And Reference Generation

Generated references shrink context costs by replacing broad code reads with durable summaries.

## Canonical Generated Files

- `core-zero/project/code-map.md`

## What A Codemap Should Capture

- major directories and responsibilities
- key entrypoints and runtime seams
- important services, packages, or modules
- safe-change watchouts

## What A References Index Should Capture

- generated schemas
- API references
- migration notes
- architecture diagrams
- external reference docs the repo depends on

## Update Triggers

- major structural refactor
- new subsystem introduction
- repeated research loops over the same code area
- frequent onboarding confusion
